pr.title: Add Codex CLI config overrides
pr.body:
## Summary
  - Add WithConfig(map[string]string) for temporary Codex CLI config overrides
  - Pass overrides to the Codex CLI as repeated -c key=value arguments, matching `codex -c key=value`
  - Sort config keys for deterministic argument ordering in tests
  - Document config override usage in README

  ## Motivation
  The main use case is overriding Codex CLI config values that are only available through temporary config overrides, especially `model_instructions_file`, without requiring users to modify their persistent Codex config.

  Example:

  ```go
  codex.WithOptions(
      codex.WithConfig(map[string]string{
          "model":                   "gpt-5.4",
          "model_instructions_file": "/path/to/instructions.md",
      }),
  )

  This lets SDK users start the Codex app-server with arguments equivalent to:

  codex -c model=gpt-5.4 -c model_instructions_file=/path/to/instructions.md app-server --listen stdio://

  ## Tests

  - go test ./...
  - Smoke-tested WithConfig using model=openai/gpt-5.4 against the real Codex CLI

 ## Reference
https://developers.openai.com/codex/config-advanced
pr.author: 1c3z
